title: Remote Command Execution (RCE) through the '/splunkd/__upload/indexing/preview' REST endpoint in Splunk Enterprise
description: Remote Command Execution (RCE) through the '/splunkd/__upload/indexing/preview' REST endpoint in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.4, 9.4.9, 9.3.10, or higher.
In addition to upgrading, to remedy the issue, set the following configurations:
- In
props.conf
, set
unarchive_cmd_start_mode = direct
- In
server.conf
under the
[general]
stanza, set
allowed_unarchive_commands
to an explicit allowlist of approved commands for unarchiving.
See
props.conf
and
server.conf
for more information.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
Product Status
